native_replay_control_rows.geometric_interpretation: The same LGRC9V3 spark-to-expansion geometry reappears under duplicate runtime replay and artifact reconstruction. The module boundary, old-center replacement, budget-preserved expansion, and native 1e-9 packet bound are stable, so label-only, thickening, reshaped-boundary, transient, merge/leakage, and hidden-producer interpretations fail closed. The candidate remains narrow because its support/coherence floors have zero margin.
native_replay_control_rows.old_basin_separation_margin_formula: 1.0 when old center removed by source-current expansion else 0.0

row_specific_thresholds_declared_before_.distinguishable_module_node_count_note: The one-node threshold is only the distinguishability baseline; the I4 candidate gate separately requires the full five-node module.
row_specific_thresholds_declared_before_.old_basin_separation_margin_formula: 1.0 when old center removed by source-current expansion else 0.0
